def write_csv_report(data, filepath):
    lines = ["id,name,value\n"]
    lines.extend(f"{row['id']},{row['name']},{row['value']}\n" for row in data)
    with open(filepath, "w") as f:
        f.writelines(lines)

def generate_config(pairs, filepath):
    lines = [f"{key}={value}\n" for key, value in pairs]
    with open(filepath, "w") as f:
        f.writelines(lines)
